headline: Albemarle (ALB) Q4 Sales Rise 16% to $1.4B on Strong Volume Growth
summary: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is one of the hot EV stocks to buy now. On February 11, Albemarle Corporation reported Q4 2025 net sales of $1.4 billion, which was a 16% increase driven by volume growth across all segments, particularly in Energy Storage and Ketjen. Despite the rise in sales, the company recorded a quarterly net […]

headline: CNBC's The China Connection newsletter: Beijing can't afford another crackdown on its tech companies
summary: China's latest policy meetings underscored the importance of domestic tech innovation to national growth.
